ItacAcademyItem.Name: Speziali medicinalisti (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: See Giovanni Fantuzzi, Notizie degli scrittori bolognesi, vol. I (1781), p.23, and Michele Medici, Memorie storiche (1852), p. 12.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
